Author: Crystal Job Rank contributors
Name: Crystal Job Rank
Punchline: Per-job CC ratings, records, badges, and an opt-in ladder.
Description: Tracks Casual and Ranked CC ratings per job, lifetime records, role streak badges, and an optional community leaderboard. Use /cjr.
Changelog: Adds a clear leaderboard for every individual job. Selecting Tank, Healer, Melee, Physical Ranged, or Caster jobs loads that job's standings immediately, with tier colors, records, refresh time, and protection against stale or cross-job responses. Existing ratings, credentials, sharing choices, and match history are preserved.
